content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6-max

## Summary

Reviewed all code changes for the milestone create/plan/show/status CLI command handlers. The implementation is solid: new file src/cli/milestone.rs (944 lines + 139 lines of unit tests), changes to src/cli/mod.rs (wiring), src/shared/error.rs (3 new error variants), src/contexts/milestone_record/model.rs (pending_requirements_run_id field on MilestoneSnapshot), and tests/cli.rs (791 lines of integration tests covering happy paths, error cases, corruption detection, locking, stale-run recovery, and workspace validation). All 4 commands (create, plan, show, status) are correctly implemented with --json support on show/status. Error messages consistently reference milestone_id and explain failures. Locking via with_milestone_write_lock prevents TOCTOU races on snapshot mutations. The plan command's pending-requirements-run reservation pattern handles concurrent starts, stale drafting runs, and all failure cleanup paths correctly. cargo test (792 passed), cargo clippy -- -D warnings, cargo fmt --check, and nix build all pass cleanly. No bugs, safety issues, or correctness gaps found.

## Amendments

None.
